title: DIFC Heights Tower: New Ultra-Luxury Development Announced
excerpt: DIFC unveils plans for the Heights Tower, a 70-storey ultra-luxury residential development featuring 180 exclusive residences with panoramic views of the Dubai skyline and Arabian Gulf.
author: DIFC Press Office

title: Complete Guide: Golden Visa Through DIFC Property Investment
excerpt: Everything you need to know about obtaining a UAE Golden Visa through property investment in DIFC. Minimum investment requirements, eligibility criteria, and application process explained.
author: DIFC.Property Legal Team

title: DIFC Property Market Report: Q4 2023 Performance Analysis
excerpt: DIFC property prices increased by 8% year-on-year in Q4 2023, driven by strong demand for luxury apartments and limited new supply. Average price per sqft reached AED 3,850.
author: DIFC.Property Research

title: Three New Dining Concepts Opening at Gate Village This Spring
excerpt: Gate Village welcomes three internationally acclaimed restaurants, enhancing DIFC's reputation as Dubai's premier culinary destination. New openings include a Michelin-starred concept.
author: DIFC Lifestyle

title: Key Updates to DIFC Real Property Law: What Property Owners Should Know
excerpt: Recent amendments to DIFC Real Property Law introduce new protections for property owners and streamlined processes for transactions. Summary of key changes for DIFC property investors.
author: Legal Advisory Team
